Player 456 — what a journey. From being broken, lost, and in debt, to becoming someone who found meaning in sacrifice, love, and justice. 0:20 I must say or admit that Marbles was one of my favorite games of the entire series. Back in September 2021, When I watched Squid Game Season 1 for the very first time, I cried a whole night thinking about Il-nam sacrificing himself in order for Gi-hun to win the round. Also for Ali’s Death or Ji-yeong’s. This game was a real turning point for me as a viewer/watcher: the show finally reveals how some people are desperate and willing to do everything in order to survive (so including sacrificing someone Else for their own luck, even if they had a strong and caring bond with the other individual). It was an absolutely great show and I must confess that I still miss the time it came out on Netflix.
